} .calc-btn.number:hover { background: #4a4a4a; } .calc-btn.func { background: #323232; color: #ffffff; } .calc-btn.func:hover { background: #424242; } .calc-btn.operator { background: #323232; color: #ffffff; } .calc-btn.operator:hover { background: #424242; } .calc-btn.operator.active { background: #ffffff; color: #1a1a1a; } .calc-btn.equals { background: #0078d4; color: #ffffff; } .calc-btn.equals:hover { background: #1084d8; } @media (max-width: 360px) { .calc-window { width: 100%; } .calc-btn { height: 44px; font-size: 14px; } .calc-result { font-size: 28px; } } var currentInput = '0'; var previousInput = ''; var operator = null; var shouldResetInput = false; var history = ''; function updateDisplay() { document.getElementById('calcResult').textContent = formatNumber(currentInput); document.getElementById('calcExpression').textContent = previousInput + (operator ? ' ' + getOperatorSymbol(operator) : ''); document.getElementById('calcHistory').textContent = history; } function formatNumber(num) { if (num === 'Error') return num; var n = parseFloat(num); if (isNaN(n)) return '0'; if (Math.abs(n) >= 1e15 || (Math.abs(n) < 1e-10 && n !== 0)) { return n.toExponential(6); } return n.toLocaleString('en-US', { maximumFractionDigits: 10 }); } function getOperatorSymbol(op) { switch(op) { case '+': return '+'; case '-': return '−'; case '*': return '×'; case '/': return '÷'; default: return op; } } function inputNumber(num) { if (shouldResetInput) { currentInput = num; shouldResetInput = false; } else { if (currentInput === '0' && num !== '.') { currentInput = num; } else { currentInput += num; } } updateDisplay(); } function inputDecimal() { if (shouldResetInput) { currentInput = '0.'; shouldResetInput = false; } else if (!currentInput.includes('.')) { currentInput += '.'; } updateDisplay(); } function inputOperator(op) { if (operator && !shouldResetInput) { calculate(); } previousInput = currentInput; operator = op; shouldResetInput = true; updateDisplay(); document.querySelectorAll('.calc-btn.operator').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.remove('active'); }); event.target.classList.add('active'); } function calculate() { if (!operator || previousInput === '') return; var prev = parseFloat(previousInput); var curr = parseFloat(currentInput); var result; switch(operator) { case '+': result = prev + curr; break; case '-': result = prev - curr; break; case '*': result = prev * curr; break; case '/': if (curr === 0) { result = 'Error'; } else { result = prev / curr; } break; } history = previousInput + ' ' + getOperatorSymbol(operator) + ' ' + currentInput + ' = ' + formatNumber(result); currentInput = result.toString(); previousInput = ''; operator = null; shouldResetInput = true; document.querySelectorAll('.calc-btn.operator').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.remove('active'); }); updateDisplay(); } function clearAll() { currentInput = '0'; previousInput = ''; operator = null; shouldResetInput = false; history = ''; document.querySelectorAll('.calc-btn.operator').forEach(function(btn) { btn.classList.remove('active'); }); updateDisplay(); } function clearEntry() { currentInput = '0'; shouldResetInput = false; updateDisplay(); } function backspace() { if (currentInput.length > 1) { currentInput = currentInput.slice(0, -1); } else { currentInput = '0'; } updateDisplay(); } function toggleSign() { if (currentInput !== '0') { if (currentInput.startsWith('-')) { currentInput = currentInput.slice(1); } else { currentInput = '-' + currentInput; } } updateDisplay(); } function inputPercent() { currentInput = (parseFloat(currentInput) / 100).toString(); updateDisplay(); } function square() { var num = parseFloat(currentInput); history = currentInput + '² = ' + formatNumber(num * num); currentInput = (num * num).toString(); shouldResetInput = true; updateDisplay(); } function sqrt() { var num = parseFloat(currentInput); if (num < 0) { currentInput = 'Error'; } else { history = '√' + currentInput + ' = ' + formatNumber(Math.sqrt(num)); currentInput = Math.sqrt(num).toString(); } shouldResetInput = true; updateDisplay(); } function inputFunction(func) { var num = parseFloat(currentInput); var result = 1 / num; history = '1/(' + currentInput + ') = ' + formatNumber(result); currentInput = result.toString(); shouldResetInput = true; updateDisplay(); } function minimizeCalc() { document.querySelector('.calc-window').classList.add('minimized'); } function maximizeCalc() { document.querySelector('.calc-window').classList.toggle('maximized'); } function closeCalc() { document.querySelector('.calculator-container').style.display = 'none'; } document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) { if (e.key >= '0' && e.key

🎯 2048 新游戏 得分: 0 最高分: 0 游戏结束! 得分: 0 再来一局 🎉 恭喜! 你达到了2048! 继续游戏 新游戏 游戏说明 使用方向键或 WASD 移动所有方块 相同数字的方块会合并成更大的数字 目标是合并出2048方块 无法移动时游戏结束 .game-container { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; margin: 0 10px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } .game-board { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 100px); grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 100px); gap: 10px; background: #bbada0; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; } .tile { width: 100px; height: 100px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.15s ease; } .tile-0 { background: rgba(238, 228, 218, 0.35); } .tile-2 { background: #eee4da; color: #776e65; } .tile-4 { background: #ede0c8; color: #776e65; } .tile-8 { background: #f2b179; color: #f9f6f2; } .tile-16 { background: #f59563; color: #f9f6f2; } .tile-32 { background: #f67c5f; color: #f9f6f2; } .tile-64 { background: #f65e3b; color: #f9f6f2; } .tile-128 { background: #edcf72; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 28px; } .tile-256 { background: #edcc61; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 28px; } .tile-512 { background: #edc850; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 28px; } .tile-1024 { background: #edc53f; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 24px; } .tile-2048 { background: #edc22e; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 24px; } .tile-super { background: #3c3a32; color: #f9f6f2; font-size: 20px; } .game-over, .game-win { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(238, 228, 218, 0.95); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 10px; } .game-over.hidden, .game-win.hidden { display: none; } .game-over h2, .game-win h2 { font-size: 2em; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #776e65; } .game-over p, .game-win p { font-size: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #776e65; } .game-over button, .game-win button { margin: 5px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: #8f7a66; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } let board = []; let score = 0; let highScore = localStorage.getItem('2048HighScore') || 0; let gameOver = false; let won = false; let continueAfterWin = false; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; function initBoard() { board = []; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { board[i] = []; for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { board[i][j] = 0; } } } function addRandomTile() { const emptyCells = []; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { if (board[i][j] === 0) { emptyCells.push({ r: i, c: j }); } } } if (emptyCells.length > 0) { const randomCell = emptyCells[Math.floor(Math.random() * emptyCells.length)]; board[randomCell.r][randomCell.c] = Math.random() < 0.9 ? 2 : 4; } } function renderBoard() { const gameBoard = document.getElementById('gameBoard'); gameBoard.innerHTML = ''; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { const tile = document.createElement('div'); const value = board[i][j]; tile.className = `tile tile-${value > 2048 ? 'super' : value}`; tile.textContent = value || ''; gameBoard.appendChild(tile); } } } function slide(row) { let arr = row.filter(val => val); let missing = 4 - arr.length; let zeros = Array(missing).fill(0); return zeros.concat(arr); } function combine(row) { for (let i = 3; i > 0; i--) { if (row[i] === row[i - 1] && row[i] !== 0) { row[i] *= 2; score += row[i]; row[i - 1] = 0; if (row[i] === 2048 && !continueAfterWin) { won = true; } } } return row; } function moveRight() { let moved = false; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { let row = board[i].slice(); row = slide(row); row = combine(row); row = slide(row); if (row.join(',') !== board[i].join(',')) { moved = true; } board[i] = row; } return moved; } function moveLeft() { let moved = false; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { let row = board[i].slice().reverse(); row = slide(row); row = combine(row); row = slide(row); row.reverse(); if (row.join(',') !== board[i].join(',')) { moved = true; } board[i] = row; } return moved; } function moveUp() { let moved = false; for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { let col = []; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { col.push(board[i][j]); } let original = col.join(','); col.reverse(); col = slide(col); col = combine(col); col = slide(col); col.reverse(); if (col.join(',') !== original) { moved = true; } for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { board[i][j] = col[i]; } } return moved; } function moveDown() { let moved = false; for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { let col = []; for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { col.push(board[i][j]); } let original = col.join(','); col = slide(col); col = combine(col); col = slide(col); if (col.join(',') !== original) { moved = true; } for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { board[i][j] = col[i]; } } return moved; } function checkGameOver() { for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < 4; j++) { if (board[i][j] === 0) { return false; } if (i < 3 && board[i][j] === board[i + 1][j]) { return false; } if (j < 3 && board[i][j] === board[i][j + 1]) { return false; } } } return true; } function updateScore() { document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; if (score > highScore) { highScore = score; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; localStorage.setItem('2048HighScore', highScore); } } function newGame() { initBoard(); score = 0; gameOver = false; won = false; continueAfterWin = false; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.add('hidden'); document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); addRandomTile(); addRandomTile(); renderBoard(); } function continueGame() { continueAfterWin = true; document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); } function handleMove(direction) { if (gameOver) return; let moved = false; switch(direction) { case 'up': moved = moveUp(); break; case 'down': moved = moveDown(); break; case 'left': moved = moveLeft(); break; case 'right': moved = moveRight(); break; } if (moved) { addRandomTile(); renderBoard(); updateScore(); if (won && !continueAfterWin) { document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.remove('hidden'); } else if (checkGameOver()) { gameOver = true; document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.remove('hidden'); } } } document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (['ArrowUp', 'ArrowDown', 'ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight'].includes(e.key)) { e.preventDefault(); } switch(e.key) { case 'ArrowUp': case 'w': case 'W': handleMove('up'); break; case 'ArrowDown': case 's': case 'S': handleMove('down'); break; case 'ArrowLeft': case 'a': case 'A': handleMove('left'); break; case 'ArrowRight': case 'd': case 'D': handleMove('right'); break; } }); // 触摸支持 let touchStartX = 0; let touchStartY = 0; document.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { touchStartX = e.touches[0].clientX; touchStartY = e.touches[0].clientY; }); document.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { const touchEndX = e.changedTouches[0].clientX; const touchEndY = e.changedTouches[0].clientY; const dx = touchEndX - touchStartX; const dy = touchEndY - touchStartY; if (Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy)) { if (dx > 50) handleMove('right'); else if (dx < -50) handleMove('left'); } else { if (dy > 50) handleMove('down'); else if (dy < -50) handleMove('up'); } }); // 初始化游戏 newGame();

title: 飞机大战
content: ✈️ 飞机大战 开始游戏 暂停 得分: 0 最高分: 0 生命: 3 游戏结束! 得分: 0 重新开始 游戏说明 使用方向键或WASD控制飞机移动 空格键发射子弹 击落敌机得分 避免被敌机撞到 .game-container { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; margin: 0 10px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-controls button:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } #gameCanvas { border: 3px solid var(--text, #333); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0f0c29, #302b63, #24243e); display: block; } .game-over { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const airplaneCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const airplaneCtx = airplaneCanvas.getContext('2d'); let player = { x: 240, y: 580, width: 40, height: 40, speed: 5 }; let bullets = []; let enemies = []; let score = 0; let highScore = localStorage.getItem('airplaneHighScore') || 0; let lives = 3; let gameLoop = null; let isPaused = false; let enemySpawnTimer = 0; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; function drawPlayer() { airplaneCtx.fillStyle = '#00ff00'; airplaneCtx.beginPath(); airplaneCtx.moveTo(player.x, player.y - player.height / 2); airplaneCtx.lineTo(player.x - player.width / 2, player.y + player.height / 2); airplaneCtx.lineTo(player.x + player.width / 2, player.y + player.height / 2); airplaneCtx.closePath(); airplaneCtx.fill(); airplaneCtx.fillStyle = '#00cc00'; airplaneCtx.fillRect(player.x - 5, player.y - 10, 10, 20); } function drawBullets() { airplaneCtx.fillStyle = '#ffff00'; for (let bullet of bullets) { airplaneCtx.fillRect(bullet.x - 2, bullet.y - 8, 4, 16); } } function drawEnemies() { for (let enemy of enemies) { airplaneCtx.fillStyle = '#ff0000'; airplaneCtx.beginPath(); airplaneCtx.moveTo(enemy.x, enemy.y + enemy.height / 2); airplaneCtx.lineTo(enemy.x - enemy.width / 2, enemy.y - enemy.height / 2); airplaneCtx.lineTo(enemy.x + enemy.width / 2, enemy.y - enemy.height / 2); airplaneCtx.closePath(); airplaneCtx.fill(); airplaneCtx.fillStyle = '#cc0000'; airplaneCtx.fillRect(enemy.x - 5, enemy.y - 10, 10, 20); } } function updateBullets() { for (let i = bullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { bullets[i].y -= 10; if (bullets[i].y < 0) { bullets.splice(i, 1); } } } function updateEnemies() { for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { enemies[i].y += enemies[i].speed; if (enemies[i].y > airplaneCanvas.height) { enemies.splice(i, 1); continue; } // 检测与玩家碰撞 if (checkCollision(player, enemies[i])) { lives--; document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives; enemies.splice(i, 1); if (lives === 0) { gameOver(); } continue; } // 检测与子弹碰撞 for (let j = bullets.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) { if (checkCollision(bullets[j], enemies[i])) { score += 10; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; if (score > highScore) { highScore = score; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; localStorage.setItem('airplaneHighScore', highScore); } bullets.splice(j, 1); enemies.splice(i, 1); break; } } } } function checkCollision(obj1, obj2) { const x1 = obj1.x - (obj1.width || 4) / 2; const y1 = obj1.y - (obj1.height || 16) / 2; const w1 = obj1.width || 4; const h1 = obj1.height || 16; const x2 = obj2.x - obj2.width / 2; const y2 = obj2.y - obj2.height / 2; return x1 < x2 + obj2.width && x1 + w1 > x2 && y1 < y2 + obj2.height && y1 + h1 > y2; } function spawnEnemy() { enemySpawnTimer++; if (enemySpawnTimer >= 60) { enemySpawnTimer = 0; enemies.push({ x: Math.random() * (airplaneCanvas.width - 40) + 20, y: -20, width: 40, height: 40, speed: 2 + Math.random() * 2 }); } } function draw() { airplaneCtx.clearRect(0, 0, airplaneCanvas.width, airplaneCanvas.height); drawPlayer(); drawBullets(); drawEnemies(); updateBullets(); updateEnemies(); spawnEnemy(); } function gameStep() { if (!isPaused) { draw(); } gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function startGame() { score = 0; lives = 3; bullets = []; enemies = []; enemySpawnTimer = 0; isPaused = false; player.x = 240; player.y = 580; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives; document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = true; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').disabled = false; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').textContent = '暂停'; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.add('hidden'); if (gameLoop) { cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop); } gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function togglePause() { isPaused = !isPaused; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').textContent = isPaused ? '继续' : '暂停'; } function gameOver() { cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop); gameLoop = null; isPaused = false; document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.remove('hidden'); document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = false; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').disabled = true; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').textContent = '暂停'; } function restartGame() { startGame(); } // 键盘控制 let keys = {}; document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { keys[e.key] = true; if (e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); if (gameLoop && !isPaused) { bullets.push({ x: player.x, y: player.y - player.height / 2 }); } } }); document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => { keys[e.key] = false; }); // 移动更新 setInterval(() => { if (!gameLoop || isPaused) return; if ((keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) && player.x > player.width / 2) { player.x -= player.speed; } if ((keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) && player.x < airplaneCanvas.width - player.width / 2) { player.x += player.speed; } if ((keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['w'] || keys['W']) && player.y > player.height / 2) { player.y -= player.speed; } if ((keys['ArrowDown'] || keys['s'] || keys['S']) && player.y < airplaneCanvas.height - player.height / 2) { player.y += player.speed; } }, 16); // 初始绘制 draw();

background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden, .game-win.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button, .game-win button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const breakoutCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const breakoutCtx = breakoutCanvas.getContext('2d'); let paddle = { width: 100, height: 15, x: 350, speed: 8 }; let ball = { x: 400, y: 550, radius: 8, dx: 3.5, dy: -3.5, speed: 5 }; let bricks = []; let score = 0; let highScore = localStorage.getItem('breakoutHighScore') || 0; let lives = 3; let level = 1; let gameLoop = null; let isPaused = false; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; const brickRowCount = 6; const brickColumnCount = 10; const brickWidth = 73; const brickHeight = 25; const brickPadding = 3; const brickOffsetTop = 50; const brickOffsetLeft = 18; const brickColors = [ '#e74c3c', // 红 '#e67e22', // 橙 '#f1c40f', // 黄 '#2ecc71', // 绿 '#3498db', // 蓝 '#9b59b6' // 紫 ]; const brickPoints = [50, 40, 30, 20, 10, 10]; function initBricks() { bricks = []; for (let c = 0; c < brickColumnCount; c++) { bricks[c] = []; for (let r = 0; r < brickRowCount; r++) { bricks[c][r] = { x: 0, y: 0, status: 1, color: brickColors[r], points: brickPoints[r] }; } } } function drawPaddle() { breakoutCtx.beginPath(); breakoutCtx.rect(paddle.x, breakoutCanvas.height - paddle.height - 10, paddle.width, paddle.height); breakoutCtx.fillStyle = '#ecf0f1'; breakoutCtx.fill(); breakoutCtx.closePath(); } function drawBall() { breakoutCtx.beginPath(); breakoutCtx.arc(ball.x, ball.y, ball.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); breakoutCtx.fillStyle = '#ecf0f1'; breakoutCtx.fill(); breakoutCtx.closePath(); } function drawBricks() { for (let c = 0; c < brickColumnCount; c++) { for (let r = 0; r < brickRowCount; r++) { if (bricks[c][r].status === 1) { const brickX = c * (brickWidth + brickPadding) + brickOffsetLeft; const brickY = r * (brickHeight + brickPadding) + brickOffsetTop; bricks[c][r].x = brickX; bricks[c][r].y = brickY; breakoutCtx.beginPath(); breakoutCtx.rect(brickX, brickY, brickWidth, brickHeight); breakoutCtx.fillStyle = bricks[c][r].color; breakoutCtx.fill(); breakoutCtx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'; breakoutCtx.stroke(); breakoutCtx.closePath(); } } } } function collisionDetection() { for (let c = 0; c < brickColumnCount; c++) { for (let r = 0; r < brickRowCount; r++) { const b = bricks[c][r]; if (b.status === 1) { if (ball.x > b.x && ball.x < b.x + brickWidth && ball.y > b.y && ball.y < b.y + brickHeight) { ball.dy = -ball.dy; b.status = 0; score += b.points; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; if (score > highScore) { highScore = score; document.getElementById('highScore').textContent = highScore; localStorage.setItem('breakoutHighScore', highScore); } // 检查是否全部消除 let allDestroyed = true; for (let i = 0; i < brickColumnCount; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < brickRowCount; j++) { if (bricks[i][j].status === 1) { allDestroyed = false; break; } } } if (allDestroyed) { gameWin(); } } } } } } function draw() { breakoutCtx.clearRect(0, 0, breakoutCanvas.width, breakoutCanvas.height); drawBricks(); drawBall(); drawPaddle(); collisionDetection(); // 墙壁碰撞 if (ball.x + ball.dx > breakoutCanvas.width - ball.radius) { ball.x = breakoutCanvas.width - ball.radius; ball.dx = -ball.dx; } else if (ball.x + ball.dx < ball.radius) { ball.x = ball.radius; ball.dx = -ball.dx; } if (ball.y + ball.dy < ball.radius) { ball.y = ball.radius; ball.dy = -ball.dy; } else if (ball.y + ball.dy > breakoutCanvas.height - ball.radius - paddle.height - 10) { if (ball.x > paddle.x && ball.x < paddle.x + paddle.width) { let hitPoint = (ball.x - paddle.x) / paddle.width; let angle = (hitPoint - 0.5) * Math.PI * 0.6; let speed = Math.sqrt(ball.dx * ball.dx + ball.dy * ball.dy); ball.dx = speed * Math.sin(angle); ball.dy = -Math.abs(speed * Math.cos(angle)); ball.y = breakoutCanvas.height - ball.radius - paddle.height - 11; } else if (ball.y + ball.dy > breakoutCanvas.height - ball.radius) { // 掉落 lives--; document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives; if (lives === 0) { gameOver(); } else { resetBall(); } } } ball.x += ball.dx; ball.y += ball.dy; } function resetBall() { ball.x = breakoutCanvas.width / 2; ball.y = breakoutCanvas.height - 50; let angle = (Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.25) * Math.PI; ball.dx = ball.speed * Math.cos(angle) * (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1); ball.dy = -ball.speed * Math.sin(angle); paddle.x = breakoutCanvas.width / 2 - paddle.width / 2; } function gameStep() { if (!isPaused) { draw(); } gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function startGame() { score = 0; lives = 3; level = 1; ball.speed = 5; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; document.getElementById('lives').textContent = lives; initBricks(); resetBall(); document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = true; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').disabled = false; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.add('hidden'); document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); if (gameLoop) { cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop); } gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function togglePause() { isPaused = !isPaused; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').textContent = isPaused ? '继续' : '暂停'; } function gameOver() { cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop); gameLoop = null; document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.remove('hidden'); document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = false; document.getElementById('pauseBtn').disabled = true; } function gameWin() { cancelAnimationFrame(gameLoop); gameLoop = null; document.getElementById('winScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.remove('hidden'); } function nextLevel() { level++; ball.speed += 0.5; initBricks(); resetBall(); document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); gameLoop = requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function restartGame() { startGame(); } // 键盘控制 let leftPressed = false; let rightPressed = false; document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') { leftPressed = true; } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') { rightPressed = true; } }); document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => { if (e.key === 'ArrowLeft' || e.key === 'a' || e.key === 'A') { leftPressed = false; } else if (e.key === 'ArrowRight' || e.key === 'd' || e.key === 'D') { rightPressed = false; } }); // 鼠标控制 breakoutCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { const rect = breakoutCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const mouseX = e.clientX - rect.left; if (mouseX > paddle.width / 2 && mouseX < breakoutCanvas.width - paddle.width / 2) { paddle.x = mouseX - paddle.width / 2; } }); // 键盘移动更新 setInterval(() => { if (leftPressed && paddle.x > 0) { paddle.x -= paddle.speed; } else if (rightPressed && paddle.x < breakoutCanvas.width - paddle.width) { paddle.x += paddle.speed; } }, 16); // 初始绘制 initBricks(); draw();

title: 接金币
content: 💰 接金币 开始游戏 得分: 0 生命: ❤️❤️❤️ 游戏结束! 最终得分: 0 再玩一次 游戏说明 使用鼠标或触摸屏左右移动篮子 接住掉落的金币得分 接住钻石获得更高分数 避开炸弹，碰到炸弹失去一条命 生命耗尽游戏结束 .game-container { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-controls button:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } #gameCanvas { border: 3px solid var(--text, #333); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #1a1a2e, #16213e); display: block; } .game-over { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const catchCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const catchCtx = catchCanvas.getContext('2d'); let basket = { x: 200, y: 450, width: 80, height: 40 }; let items = []; let score = 0; let lives = 3; let gameRunning = false; let gameLoop = null; let spawnTimer = null; let difficulty = 1; let particles = []; const ITEM_TYPES = { COIN: { color: '#f1c40f', points: 10, radius: 15 }, DIAMOND: { color: '#3498db', points: 30, radius: 12 }, BOMB: { color: '#e74c3c', points: -1, radius: 18 } }; function initGame() { score = 0; lives = 3; difficulty = 1; items = []; particles = []; basket.x = catchCanvas.width / 2 - basket.width / 2; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; updateLives(); document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.add('hidden'); } function updateLives() { document.getElementById('lives').textContent = '❤️'.repeat(lives); } function spawnItem() { const rand = Math.random(); let type; if (rand < 0.1) { type = 'BOMB'; } else if (rand < 0.25) { type = 'DIAMOND'; } else { type = 'COIN'; } items.push({ x: Math.random() * (catchCanvas.width - 40) + 20, y: -20, type: type, ...ITEM_TYPES[type], vy: 2 + difficulty * 0.5, rotation: 0 }); } function createParticles(x, y, color, count) { for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) { particles.push({ x: x, y: y, vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8, vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8 - 2, radius: Math.random() * 4 + 2, color: color, alpha: 1 }); } } function draw() { catchCtx.clearRect(0, 0, catchCanvas.width, catchCanvas.height); const gradient = catchCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, catchCanvas.height); gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e'); gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e'); catchCtx.fillStyle = gradient; catchCtx.fillRect(0, 0, catchCanvas.width, catchCanvas.height); for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) { catchCtx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${Math.random() * 0.5})`; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc( Math.random() * catchCanvas.width, Math.random() * catchCanvas.height, Math.random() * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2 ); catchCtx.fill(); } items.forEach(item => { catchCtx.save(); catchCtx.translate(item.x, item.y); catchCtx.rotate(item.rotation); if (item.type === 'COIN') { const coinGradient = catchCtx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, item.radius); coinGradient.addColorStop(0, '#fff'); coinGradient.addColorStop(0.3, item.color); coinGradient.addColorStop(1, '#c9a227'); catchCtx.fillStyle = coinGradient; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc(0, 0, item.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); catchCtx.fill(); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#c9a227'; catchCtx.font = 'bold 14px Arial'; catchCtx.textAlign = 'center'; catchCtx.textBaseline = 'middle'; catchCtx.fillText('$', 0, 0); } else if (item.type === 'DIAMOND') { catchCtx.fillStyle = item.color; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.moveTo(0, -item.radius); catchCtx.lineTo(item.radius, 0); catchCtx.lineTo(0, item.radius); catchCtx.lineTo(-item.radius, 0); catchCtx.closePath(); catchCtx.fill(); catchCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.moveTo(0, -item.radius); catchCtx.lineTo(item.radius * 0.3, -item.radius * 0.3); catchCtx.lineTo(0, 0); catchCtx.lineTo(-item.radius * 0.3, -item.radius * 0.3); catchCtx.closePath(); catchCtx.fill(); } else if (item.type === 'BOMB') { catchCtx.fillStyle = '#333'; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc(0, 0, item.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); catchCtx.fill(); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c'; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc(0, 0, item.radius - 3, 0, Math.PI * 2); catchCtx.fill(); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#333'; catchCtx.fillRect(-3, -item.radius - 8, 6, 10); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#f39c12'; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc(0, -item.radius - 10, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2); catchCtx.fill(); } catchCtx.restore(); }); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#8B4513'; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.moveTo(basket.x, basket.y + basket.height); catchCtx.lineTo(basket.x + basket.width, basket.y + basket.height); catchCtx.lineTo(basket.x + basket.width - 10, basket.y); catchCtx.lineTo(basket.x + 10, basket.y); catchCtx.closePath(); catchCtx.fill(); catchCtx.strokeStyle = '#654321'; catchCtx.lineWidth = 2; catchCtx.stroke(); catchCtx.fillStyle = '#654321'; catchCtx.fillRect(basket.x + 5, basket.y + basket.height - 5, basket.width - 10, 5); particles.forEach(p => { catchCtx.fillStyle = `rgba(${hexToRgb(p.color)}, ${p.alpha})`; catchCtx.beginPath(); catchCtx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); catchCtx.fill(); }); } function hexToRgb(hex) { const result = /^#?([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})$/i.exec(hex); return result ? `${parseInt(result[1], 16)}, ${parseInt(result[2], 16)}, ${parseInt(result[3], 16)}` : '255, 255, 255'; } function update() { items.forEach((item, index) => { item.y += item.vy; item.rotation += 0.05; if (item.y + item.radius > basket.y && item.y - item.radius < basket.y + basket.height && item.x > basket.x && item.x < basket.x + basket.width) { if (item.type === 'BOMB') { lives--; updateLives(); createParticles(item.x, item.y, '#e74c3c', 20); if (lives catchCanvas.height + 20) { items.splice(index, 1); } }); particles.forEach((p, index) => { p.x += p.vx; p.y += p.vy; p.vy += 0.2; p.alpha -= 0.02; if (p.alpha difficulty * 100) { difficulty = Math.min(difficulty + 0.5, 5); } } function gameStep() { if (!gameRunning) return; update(); draw(); requestAnimationFrame(gameStep); } function startGame() { initGame(); gameRunning = true; document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = true; spawnTimer = setInterval(() => { if (gameRunning) { spawnItem(); } }, 1000 - difficulty * 100); gameStep(); } function gameOver() { gameRunning = false; clearInterval(spawnTimer); document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.remove('hidden'); document.getElementById('startBtn').disabled = false; } catchCanvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { if (!gameRunning) return; const rect = catchCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = e.clientX - rect.left; basket.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(x - basket.width / 2, catchCanvas.width - basket.width)); }); catchCanvas.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (!gameRunning) return; const rect = catchCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left; basket.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(x - basket.width / 2, catchCanvas.width - basket.width)); }); initGame(); draw();

title: 五子棋
content: ⚫⚪ 五子棋 新游戏 当前: 你的回合 游戏结束! 再来一局 游戏说明 你执黑棋，AI执白棋 点击棋盘空位落子 先连成五子一线者获胜 横、竖、斜均可连成五子 .game-container { max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-status { color: var(--theme, #3498db); font-weight: bold; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } #gameCanvas { border: 3px solid var(--text, #333); background: #dcb35c; display: block; cursor: pointer; } .game-over { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const gobangCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const gobangCtx = gobangCanvas.getContext('2d'); const BOARD_SIZE = 15; const CELL_SIZE = 40; const PLAYER = 1; // 黑棋 - 玩家 const AI = 2; // 白棋 - AI let board = []; let gameOver = false; let lastMove = null; let isPlayerTurn = true; function initBoard() { board = []; for (let i = 0; i < BOARD_SIZE; i++) { board[i] = []; for (let j = 0; j < BOARD_SIZE; j++) { board[i][j] = 0; } } } function drawBoard() { gobangCtx.clearRect(0, 0, gobangCanvas.width, gobangCanvas.height); gobangCtx.fillStyle = '#dcb35c'; gobangCtx.fillRect(0, 0, gobangCanvas.width, gobangCanvas.height); gobangCtx.strokeStyle = '#000'; gobangCtx.lineWidth = 1; for (let i = 0; i < BOARD_SIZE; i++) { gobangCtx.beginPath(); gobangCtx.moveTo(CELL_SIZE / 2, CELL_SIZE / 2 + i * CELL_SIZE); gobangCtx.lineTo(gobangCanvas.width - CELL_SIZE / 2, CELL_SIZE / 2 + i * CELL_SIZE); gobangCtx.stroke(); gobangCtx.beginPath(); gobangCtx.moveTo(CELL_SIZE / 2 + i * CELL_SIZE, CELL_SIZE / 2); gobangCtx.lineTo(CELL_SIZE / 2 + i * CELL_SIZE, gobangCanvas.height - CELL_SIZE / 2); gobangCtx.stroke(); } const starPoints = [ [3, 3], [3, 11], [11, 3], [11, 11], [7, 7], [3, 7], [11, 7], [7, 3], [7, 11] ]; gobangCtx.fillStyle = '#000'; for (let point of starPoints) { gobangCtx.beginPath(); gobangCtx.arc( CELL_SIZE / 2 + point[0] * CELL_SIZE, CELL_SIZE / 2 + point[1] * CELL_SIZE, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2 ); gobangCtx.fill(); } for (let i = 0; i < BOARD_SIZE; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < BOARD_SIZE; j++) { if (board[i][j] !== 0) { drawPiece(i, j, board[i][j]); } } } if (lastMove) { gobangCtx.strokeStyle = '#ff0000'; gobangCtx.lineWidth = 2; gobangCtx.beginPath(); gobangCtx.arc( CELL_SIZE / 2 + lastMove.x * CELL_SIZE, CELL_SIZE / 2 + lastMove.y * CELL_SIZE, CELL_SIZE / 2 - 5, 0, Math.PI * 2 ); gobangCtx.stroke(); } } function drawPiece(x, y, player) { const centerX = CELL_SIZE / 2 + x * CELL_SIZE; const centerY = CELL_SIZE / 2 + y * CELL_SIZE; const radius = CELL_SIZE / 2 - 3; gobangCtx.beginPath(); gobangCtx.arc(centerX, centerY, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); if (player === PLAYER) { const gradient = gobangCtx.createRadialGradient( centerX - 5, centerY - 5, 0, centerX, centerY, radius ); gradient.addColorStop(0, '#666'); gradient.addColorStop(1, '#000'); gobangCtx.fillStyle = gradient; } else { const gradient = gobangCtx.createRadialGradient( centerX - 5, centerY - 5, 0, centerX, centerY, radius ); gradient.addColorStop(0, '#fff'); gradient.addColorStop(1, '#ddd'); gobangCtx.fillStyle = gradient; } gobangCtx.fill(); gobangCtx.strokeStyle = '#000'; gobangCtx.lineWidth = 1; gobangCtx.stroke(); } function getGridPosition(clientX, clientY) { const rect = gobangCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = clientX - rect.left; const y = clientY - rect.top; const gridX = Math.round((x - CELL_SIZE / 2) / CELL_SIZE); const gridY = Math.round((y - CELL_SIZE / 2) / CELL_SIZE); if (gridX >= 0 && gridX < BOARD_SIZE && gridY >= 0 && gridY < BOARD_SIZE) { return { x: gridX, y: gridY }; } return null; } function checkWin(x, y, player) { const directions = [ [1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 1], [1, -1] ]; for (let [dx, dy] of directions) { let count = 1; for (let i = 1; i < 5; i++) { const nx = x + dx * i; const ny = y + dy * i; if (nx >= 0 && nx < BOARD_SIZE && ny >= 0 && ny < BOARD_SIZE && board[nx][ny] === player) { count++; } else { break; } } for (let i = 1; i < 5; i++) { const nx = x - dx * i; const ny = y - dy * i; if (nx >= 0 && nx < BOARD_SIZE && ny >= 0 && ny < BOARD_SIZE && board[nx][ny] === player) { count++; } else { break; } } if (count >= 5) { return true; } } return false; } function evaluatePoint(x, y, player) { if (board[x][y] !== 0) return 0; let score = 0; const directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 1], [1, -1]]; for (let [dx, dy] of directions) { let count = 1; let block = 0; let empty = 0; for (let i = 1; i

title: 小游戏
content: 🎮 小游戏中心 🐍 贪吃蛇 经典贪吃蛇游戏，控制蛇吃食物，不要撞墙和自己！ 经典 休闲 🧱 俄罗斯方块 经典俄罗斯方块，消除方块，挑战高分！ 经典 益智 🎯 2048 数字合并游戏，挑战2048方块！ 益智 数字 ⚡ 打砖块 经典打砖块游戏，用球击碎所有砖块！ 经典 动作 💣 扫雷 经典扫雷游戏，找出所有地雷！ 经典 策略 ⚫ 五子棋 经典五子棋对战，先连成五子获胜！ 经典 策略 🃏 记忆翻牌 翻开卡片找出配对，考验记忆力！ 益智 记忆 ✈️ 飞机大战 经典射击游戏，击落敌机得分！ 动作 射击 📦 推箱子 经典益智游戏，将箱子推到目标位置！ 益智 策略 🔢 数字华容道 滑块拼图游戏，将数字按顺序排列！ 益智 拼图 🦘 跳一跳 控制小人跳跃，精准落在平台上！ 休闲 反应 💎 消消乐 三消游戏，交换宝石消除得分！ 休闲 益智 🔨 打地鼠 快速敲打冒出的地鼠，考验反应速度！ 休闲 反应 🪙 接金币 控制角色接住掉落的金币，躲避炸弹！ 休闲 反应 ☯️ 修仙模拟器 大型修仙游戏，修炼、探索、炼丹、突破境界！ 大型 RPG 🗼 魔塔 经典魔塔复刻，8层塔楼，策略数值战斗！ 大型 经典 🎲 3D魔方 3D魔方模拟器，支持旋转、打乱和重置！ 3D 益智 .games-container { max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; } .games-container h1 { text-align: center; font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 30px; } .games-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 25px; } .game-card { display: block; background: var(--card, #fff); border-radius: 15px; padding: 25px; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: all 0.3s ease; border: 2px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .game-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); border-color: var(--theme, #3498db); } .game-card:hover .game-icon { transform: scale(1.2) rotate(5deg); } .game-icon { font-size: 3.5em; text-align: center; margin-bottom: 15px; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .game-card h2 { font-size: 1.4em; margin-bottom: 12px; text-align: center; color: var(--text, #333); } .game-card p { color: var(--text-p3, #666); line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 15px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.95em; } .game-tags { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .tag { background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 15px; font-size: 0.8em; font-weight: 500; } @media (max-width: 768px) { .games-container h1 { font-size: 2em; } .game-card { padding: 20px; } .game-icon { font-size: 3em; } } document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.games-toc-item'); tocLinks.forEach(function(link) { link.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.preventDefault(); var targetId = this.getAttribute('href').substring(1); var targetElement = document.getElementById(targetId); if (targetElement) { targetElement.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' }); } }); }); });

title: 跳一跳
content: 🎯 跳一跳 得分: 0 最高分: 0 游戏结束! 得分: 0 重新开始 跳一跳 按住蓄力，松开跳跃 开始游戏 游戏说明 按住鼠标或空格键蓄力，松开跳跃 蓄力时间越长，跳跃距离越远 跳到方块中心得分更高 掉落或跳出边界游戏结束 .game-container { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2em; margin-bottom: 10px; } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 15px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 10px 0; } #gameCanvas { border: 3px solid var(--text, #333); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #87CEEB, #E0F6FF); display: block; cursor: pointer; } .game-over, .start-screen { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; z-index: 10; } .game-over.hidden, .start-screen.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button, .start-screen button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: #3498db; color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 20px; text-align: left; padding: 15px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 10px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 5px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: #3498db; } (function() { const jumpCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const jumpCtx = jumpCanvas.getContext('2d'); const PLAYER_SIZE = 30; const PLATFORM_HEIGHT = 80; const BASE_Y = 450; const SKINS = { 'default': '👤', 'cat': '🐱', 'dog': '🐕', 'robot': '🤖', 'alien': '👽', 'ghost': '👻', 'panda': '🐼', 'frog': '🐸' }; let player = { x: 0, y: 0, vy: 0, vx: 0, jumping: false, squash: 1 }; let platforms = []; let currentPlatformIndex = 0; let score = 0; let bestScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('jumpBestScore')) || 0; let isCharging = false; let chargeTime = 0; let gameRunning = false; let cameraOffset = 0; function getSkin() { return localStorage.getItem('jump_player_skin') || 'default'; } function isPlayerVisible() { return localStorage.getItem('jump_show_player') !== 'false'; } const COLORS = ['#3498db', '#e74c3c', '#2ecc71', '#f1c40f', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c', '#e67e22']; function initGame() { score = 0; currentPlatformIndex = 0; cameraOffset = 0; platforms = []; platforms.push({ x: 100, width: 80, color: COLORS[0] }); for (let i = 1; i < 10; i++) { generatePlatform(); } player.x = platforms[0].x + platforms[0].width / 2; player.y = BASE_Y; player.vy = 0; player.vx = 0; player.jumping = false; player.squash = 1; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = bestScore; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.add('hidden'); document.getElementById('startScreen').classList.add('hidden'); } function generatePlatform() { const lastPlatform = platforms[platforms.length - 1]; const gap = 100 + Math.random() * 80; const width = 50 + Math.random() * 40; const direction = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1; let newX = lastPlatform.x + lastPlatform.width / 2 + gap * direction - width / 2; newX = Math.max(30, Math.min(newX, jumpCanvas.width - width - 30)); platforms.push({ x: newX, width: width, color: COLORS[platforms.length % COLORS.length] }); } function draw() { jumpCtx.clearRect(0, 0, jumpCanvas.width, jumpCanvas.height); const gradient = jumpCtx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, jumpCanvas.height); gradient.addColorStop(0, '#87CEEB'); gradient.addColorStop(1, '#E0F6FF'); jumpCtx.fillStyle = gradient; jumpCtx.fillRect(0, 0, jumpCanvas.width, jumpCanvas.height); jumpCtx.save(); jumpCtx.translate(-cameraOffset, 0); platforms.forEach((platform, index) => { jumpCtx.fillStyle = platform.color; jumpCtx.fillRect(platform.x, BASE_Y, platform.width, PLATFORM_HEIGHT); jumpCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'; jumpCtx.fillRect(platform.x, BASE_Y, platform.width, 10); jumpCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.2)'; jumpCtx.fillRect(platform.x, BASE_Y + PLATFORM_HEIGHT - 5, platform.width, 5); }); if (isPlayerVisible()) { const skin = getSkin(); const emoji = SKINS[skin] || '👤'; const size = PLAYER_SIZE * (isCharging && !player.jumping ? player.squash : 1); jumpCtx.font = size + 'px Arial'; jumpCtx.textAlign = 'center'; jumpCtx.textBaseline = 'bottom'; if (isCharging && !player.jumping) { jumpCtx.save(); jumpCtx.translate(player.x, player.y); jumpCtx.scale(player.squash, 1 / player.squash); jumpCtx.fillText(emoji, 0, 0); jumpCtx.restore(); } else { jumpCtx.fillText(emoji, player.x, player.y); } } else { if (isCharging && !player.jumping) { player.squash = 1 - (chargeTime / 150) * 0.4; jumpCtx.fillStyle = '#333'; jumpCtx.fillRect( player.x - PLAYER_SIZE / 2 * player.squash, player.y - PLAYER_SIZE * player.squash, PLAYER_SIZE * player.squash, PLAYER_SIZE * player.squash ); } else if (player.jumping) { jumpCtx.fillStyle = '#333'; jumpCtx.fillRect( player.x - PLAYER_SIZE / 2, player.y - PLAYER_SIZE, PLAYER_SIZE, PLAYER_SIZE ); } else { jumpCtx.fillStyle = '#333'; jumpCtx.fillRect( player.x - PLAYER_SIZE / 2, player.y - PLAYER_SIZE, PLAYER_SIZE, PLAYER_SIZE ); jumpCtx.fillStyle = '#fff'; jumpCtx.fillRect(player.x - 8, player.y - PLAYER_SIZE + 8, 5, 5); jumpCtx.fillRect(player.x + 3, player.y - PLAYER_SIZE + 8, 5, 5); } } jumpCtx.restore(); if (isCharging) { const barWidth = 120; const barHeight = 12; const barX = jumpCanvas.width / 2 - barWidth / 2; const barY = 30; jumpCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; jumpCtx.fillRect(barX, barY, barWidth, barHeight); jumpCtx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c'; jumpCtx.fillRect(barX, barY, Math.min(chargeTime / 150, 1) * barWidth, barHeight); jumpCtx.strokeStyle = '#fff'; jumpCtx.strokeRect(barX, barY, barWidth, barHeight); } } function update() { if (!gameRunning) return; if (player.jumping) { player.y += player.vy; player.vy += 0.6; player.x += player.vx; const nextPlatform = platforms[currentPlatformIndex + 1]; if (nextPlatform && player.y >= BASE_Y) { if (player.x > nextPlatform.x && player.x < nextPlatform.x + nextPlatform.width) { player.y = BASE_Y; player.jumping = false; player.vx = 0; player.vy = 0; currentPlatformIndex++; const centerDist = Math.abs(player.x - (nextPlatform.x + nextPlatform.width / 2)); if (centerDist < 8) { score += 2; } else { score += 1; } document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; while (platforms.length - currentPlatformIndex < 8) { generatePlatform(); } const targetOffset = player.x - jumpCanvas.width / 2; cameraOffset += (targetOffset - cameraOffset) * 0.1; } else if (player.y > jumpCanvas.height) { gameOver(); } } if (player.y > jumpCanvas.height) { gameOver(); } } if (isCharging && chargeTime < 150) { chargeTime += 1; } draw(); requestAnimationFrame(update); } function jump() { if (player.jumping || !gameRunning) return; const power = Math.min(chargeTime / 150, 1); const jumpDistance = 30 + power * 150; const jumpHeight = -10 - power * 6; const nextPlatform = platforms[currentPlatformIndex + 1]; if (nextPlatform) { const targetCenter = nextPlatform.x + nextPlatform.width / 2; const distance = targetCenter - player.x; player.vx = distance > 0 ? jumpDistance / 15 : -jumpDistance / 15; } else { player.vx = jumpDistance / 15; } player.vy = jumpHeight; player.jumping = true; player.squash = 1; chargeTime = 0; isCharging = false; } function startCharge() { if (!player.jumping && gameRunning) { isCharging = true; chargeTime = 0; } } function gameOver() { gameRunning = false; if (score > bestScore) { bestScore = score; localStorage.setItem('jumpBestScore', bestScore); document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = bestScore; } document.getElementById('finalScore').textContent = score; document.getElementById('gameOver').classList.remove('hidden'); } window.startGame = function() { initGame(); gameRunning = true; update(); }; jumpCanvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); startCharge(); }); jumpCanvas.addEventListener('mouseup', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (isCharging) jump(); }); jumpCanvas.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); startCharge(); }); jumpCanvas.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (isCharging) jump(); }); document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { if (e.code === 'Space') { e.preventDefault(); if (!isCharging && gameRunning && !player.jumping) { startCharge(); } } }); document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => { if (e.code === 'Space') { e.preventDefault(); if (isCharging) jump(); } }); document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = bestScore; draw(); })();

name: '防御+10', cost: 150, effect: { def: 10 } }, { name: '黄钥匙x3', cost: 50, effect: { yellowKey: 3 } }, { name: '蓝钥匙x2', cost: 100, effect: { blueKey: 2 } }, { name: '红钥匙x1', cost: 200, effect: { redKey: 1 } } ]; class MagicTower { constructor() { this.canvas = document.getElementById('towerCanvas'); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); this.loadGame(); this.init(); } init() { document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => this.handleKey(e)); this.render(); this.updateUI(); } reset() { this.player = { x: 2, y: 2, hp: 1000, atk: 10, def: 10, gold: 0, keys: { yellow: 1, blue: 0, red: 0 } }; this.currentFloor = 0; this.floors = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(FLOORS)); this.gameOver = false; } handleKey(e) { if (this.gameOver) return; const keyMap = { 'ArrowUp': [0, -1], 'w': [0, -1], 'W': [0, -1], 'ArrowDown': [0, 1], 's': [0, 1], 'S': [0, 1], 'ArrowLeft': [-1, 0], 'a': [-1, 0], 'A': [-1, 0], 'ArrowRight': [1, 0], 'd': [1, 0], 'D': [1, 0] }; if (keyMap[e.key]) { e.preventDefault(); this.move(...keyMap[e.key]); } } move(dx, dy) { const newX = this.player.x + dx; const newY = this.player.y + dy; const floor = this.floors[this.currentFloor]; if (newX < 0 || newX >= MAP_WIDTH || newY < 0 || newY >= MAP_HEIGHT) return; const tile = floor.map[newY][newX]; if (this.handleTile(tile, newX, newY)) { floor.map[this.player.y][this.player.x] = 0; this.player.x = newX; this.player.y = newY; floor.map[newY][newX] = 2; this.render(); this.updateUI(); } } handleTile(tile, x, y) { if (tile === 1) return false; if (tile === 5) { if (this.player.keys.yellow > 0) { this.player.keys.yellow--; this.log('使用黄钥匙开门'); return true; } this.log('需要黄钥匙！'); return false; } if (tile === 6) { if (this.player.keys.blue > 0) { this.player.keys.blue--; this.log('使用蓝钥匙开门'); return true; } this.log('需要蓝钥匙！'); return false; } if (tile === 7) { if (this.player.keys.red > 0) { this.player.keys.red--; this.log('使用红钥匙开门'); return true; } this.log('需要红钥匙！'); return false; } if (typeof tile === 'string' && MONSTERS[tile]) { return this.fight(tile, x, y); } if (tile === 3) { this.goUp(); return false; } if (tile === 4) { this.goDown(); return false; } if (tile === 8) { this.player.keys.yellow++; this.log('获得黄钥匙'); return true; } if (tile === 9) { this.player.keys.blue++; this.log('获得蓝钥匙'); return true; } if (tile === 10) { this.player.keys.red++; this.log('获得红钥匙'); return true; } if (tile === 11) { this.player.hp += 200; this.log('使用红药水，生命+200'); return true; } if (tile === 12) { this.player.hp += 500; this.log('使用蓝药水，生命+500'); return true; } if (tile === 13) { this.player.atk += 3; this.log('使用红宝石，攻击+3'); return true; } if (tile === 14) { this.player.def += 3; this.log('使用蓝宝石，防御+3'); return true; } if (tile === 15) { this.player.gold += 50; this.log('获得50金币'); return true; } if (tile === 16) { this.openShop(); return false; } return true; } fight(monsterType, x, y) { const monster = MONSTERS[monsterType]; const damage = this.calculateDamage(monster); if (damage === Infinity) { this.log(`无法击败${monster.name}！防御太低！`); return false; } if (damage >= this.player.hp) { this.log(`无法击败${monster.name}！生命不足！`); return false; } this.player.hp -= damage; this.player.gold += monster.gold; this.log(`击败${monster.name}，损失${damage}生命，获得${monster.gold}金币`); if (monster.isBoss) { this.log(`🎉 击败了Boss：${monster.name}！`); } return true; } calculateDamage(monster) { if (this.player.atk = this.floors.length - 1) { if (this.floors[this.currentFloor].isTop) { this.victory(); } return; } this.currentFloor++; const floor = this.floors[this.currentFloor]; this.player.x = floor.start.x; this.player.y = floor.start.y; floor.map[this.player.y][this.player.x] = 2; this.log(`上到第${this.currentFloor + 1}层`); this.render(); this.updateUI(); } goDown() { if (this.currentFloor

title: 记忆翻牌
content: 🃏 记忆翻牌 新游戏 步数: 0 时间: 0s 最佳: - 🎉 恭喜过关! 用时: 0秒 步数: 0步 再来一局 游戏说明 点击卡片翻开，找出所有配对 每次只能翻开两张卡片 配对成功会保持翻开状态 用最少步数和时间完成挑战 .game-container { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } .game-board { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 100px); grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 100px); gap: 10px; perspective: 1000px; } .card { position: relative; width: 100px; height: 100px; cursor: pointer; transform-style: preserve-3d; transition: transform 0.6s; } .card.flipped { transform: rotateY(180deg); } .card.matched { opacity: 0.6; cursor: default; } .card-front, .card-back { position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; backface-visibility: hidden; border-radius: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 40px; } .card-front { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; transform: rotateY(180deg); } .card-back { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f093fb 0%, #f5576c 100%); color: white; font-size: 30px; } .game-win { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-win.hidden { display: none; } .game-win button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const symbols = ['🎮', '🎲', '🎯', '🎪', '🎨', '🎭', '🎸', '🎺']; let cards = []; let flippedCards = []; let matchedPairs = 0; let moves = 0; let timer = 0; let timerInterval = null; let canFlip = true; let bestScore = localStorage.getItem('memoryBestScore'); if (bestScore) { document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = bestScore; } function shuffle(array) { const newArray = [...array]; for (let i = newArray.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [newArray[i], newArray[j]] = [newArray[j], newArray[i]]; } return newArray; } function createCards() { const gameBoard = document.getElementById('gameBoard'); gameBoard.innerHTML = ''; const cardSymbols = shuffle([...symbols, ...symbols]); cardSymbols.forEach((symbol, index) => { const card = document.createElement('div'); card.className = 'card'; card.dataset.symbol = symbol; card.dataset.index = index; card.innerHTML = ` ${symbol} ? `; card.addEventListener('click', () => flipCard(card)); gameBoard.appendChild(card); cards.push(card); }); } function flipCard(card) { if (!canFlip || card.classList.contains('flipped') || card.classList.contains('matched')) { return; } card.classList.add('flipped'); flippedCards.push(card); if (flippedCards.length === 2) { moves++; document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves; if (timerInterval === null) { startTimer(); } const [card1, card2] = flippedCards; if (card1.dataset.symbol === card2.dataset.symbol) { card1.classList.add('matched'); card2.classList.add('matched'); matchedPairs++; flippedCards = []; if (matchedPairs === symbols.length) { gameWin(); } } else { canFlip = false; setTimeout(() => { card1.classList.remove('flipped'); card2.classList.remove('flipped'); flippedCards = []; canFlip = true; }, 1000); } } } function startTimer() { timerInterval = setInterval(() => { timer++; document.getElementById('timer').textContent = timer; }, 1000); } function stopTimer() { if (timerInterval) { clearInterval(timerInterval); timerInterval = null; } } function gameWin() { stopTimer(); document.getElementById('finalTime').textContent = timer; document.getElementById('finalMoves').textContent = moves; const score = timer + moves; if (!bestScore || score < parseInt(bestScore)) { bestScore = score; localStorage.setItem('memoryBestScore', bestScore); document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = bestScore; } document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.remove('hidden'); } function newGame() { cards = []; flippedCards = []; matchedPairs = 0; moves = 0; timer = 0; canFlip = true; stopTimer(); document.getElementById('moves').textContent = '0'; document.getElementById('timer').textContent = '0'; document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); createCards(); } // 初始化游戏 newGame();

title: 消消乐
content: 💎 消消乐 新游戏 得分: 0 剩余步数: 30 游戏结束! 最终得分: 0 再玩一次 游戏说明 点击两个相邻的方块交换位置 三个或更多相同颜色的方块连成一线即可消除 消除方块得分，连消得分更高 在限定步数内获得尽可能高的分数 .game-container { max-width: 500px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } #gameCanvas { border: 3px solid var(--text, #333); background: #2c3e50; display: block; cursor: pointer; } .game-over { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } const matchCanvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas'); const matchCtx = matchCanvas.getContext('2d'); const GRID_SIZE = 8; const CELL_SIZE = matchCanvas.width / GRID_SIZE; const COLORS = ['#e74c3c', '#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#f1c40f', '#9b59b6', '#1abc9c']; const SHAPES = ['circle', 'square', 'diamond', 'triangle', 'star', 'heart']; let grid = []; let selected = null; let score = 0; let moves = 30; let isAnimating = false; function initGrid() { grid = []; for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE; i++) { grid[i] = []; for (let j = 0; j < GRID_SIZE; j++) { let color; do { color = Math.floor(Math.random() * COLORS.length); } while (wouldMatch(i, j, color)); grid[i][j] = color; } } } function wouldMatch(x, y, color) { if (x >= 2 && grid[x-1][y] === color && grid[x-2][y] === color) return true; if (y >= 2 && grid[x][y-1] === color && grid[x][y-2] === color) return true; return false; } function draw() { matchCtx.clearRect(0, 0, matchCanvas.width, matchCanvas.height); for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < GRID_SIZE; j++) { const x = i * CELL_SIZE; const y = j * CELL_SIZE; matchCtx.fillStyle = '#34495e'; matchCtx.fillRect(x + 2, y + 2, CELL_SIZE - 4, CELL_SIZE - 4); if (grid[i][j] !== -1) { drawShape(x + CELL_SIZE/2, y + CELL_SIZE/2, grid[i][j], selected && selected.x === i && selected.y === j); } } } } function drawShape(x, y, colorIndex, isSelected) { const color = COLORS[colorIndex]; const size = CELL_SIZE / 2 - 8; matchCtx.fillStyle = color; matchCtx.strokeStyle = isSelected ? '#fff' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'; matchCtx.lineWidth = isSelected ? 3 : 1; matchCtx.beginPath(); matchCtx.arc(x, y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2); matchCtx.fill(); matchCtx.stroke(); if (isSelected) { matchCtx.strokeStyle = '#fff'; matchCtx.lineWidth = 2; matchCtx.setLineDash([5, 5]); matchCtx.strokeRect(x - size - 5, y - size - 5, size * 2 + 10, size * 2 + 10); matchCtx.setLineDash([]); } } function getGridPos(clientX, clientY) { const rect = matchCanvas.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = clientX - rect.left; const y = clientY - rect.top; return { x: Math.floor(x / CELL_SIZE), y: Math.floor(y / CELL_SIZE) }; } function isAdjacent(pos1, pos2) { const dx = Math.abs(pos1.x - pos2.x); const dy = Math.abs(pos1.y - pos2.y); return (dx === 1 && dy === 0) || (dx === 0 && dy === 1); } function swap(pos1, pos2) { const temp = grid[pos1.x][pos1.y]; grid[pos1.x][pos1.y] = grid[pos2.x][pos2.y]; grid[pos2.x][pos2.y] = temp; } function findMatches() { const matches = new Set(); for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE; i++) { for (let j = 0; j < GRID_SIZE - 2; j++) { if (grid[i][j] !== -1 && grid[i][j] === grid[i][j+1] && grid[i][j] === grid[i][j+2]) { matches.add(`${i},${j}`); matches.add(`${i},${j+1}`); matches.add(`${i},${j+2}`); let k = j + 3; while (k < GRID_SIZE && grid[i][k] === grid[i][j]) { matches.add(`${i},${k}`); k++; } } } } for (let j = 0; j < GRID_SIZE; j++) { for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE - 2; i++) { if (grid[i][j] !== -1 && grid[i][j] === grid[i+1][j] && grid[i][j] === grid[i+2][j]) { matches.add(`${i},${j}`); matches.add(`${i+1},${j}`); matches.add(`${i+2},${j}`); let k = i + 3; while (k < GRID_SIZE && grid[k][j] === grid[i][j]) { matches.add(`${k},${j}`); k++; } } } } return matches; } function removeMatches(matches) { matches.forEach(pos => { const [x, y] = pos.split(',').map(Number); grid[x][y] = -1; }); return matches.size; } function dropBlocks() { for (let i = 0; i < GRID_SIZE; i++) { let emptySpaces = 0; for (let j = GRID_SIZE - 1; j >= 0; j--) { if (grid[i][j] === -1) { emptySpaces++; } else if (emptySpaces > 0) { grid[i][j + emptySpaces] = grid[i][j]; grid[i][j] = -1; } } for (let j = 0; j < emptySpaces; j++) { grid[i][j] = Math.floor(Math.random() * COLORS.length); } } } async function processMatches() { let combo = 0; let hasMatches = true; while (hasMatches) { const matches = findMatches(); if (matches.size > 0) { combo++; const points = matches.size * 10 * combo; score += points; document.getElementById('score').textContent = score; removeMatches(matches); draw(); await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200)); dropBlocks(); draw(); await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200)); } else { hasMatches = false; } } return combo > 0; } async function handleClick(e) { if (isAnimating || moves 0) { moves--; document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves; await processMatches(); if (moves

title: 数字华容道
content: 🔢 数字华容道 3×3 4×4 5×5 步数: 0 时间: 0s 最佳: - 🎉 恭喜过关! 用时: 0秒 步数: 0步 再来一局 游戏说明 点击数字方块移动到空位 将数字按顺序排列（1, 2, 3...） 空格在右下角为完成状态 用最少步数和时间完成挑战 .game-container { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .game-header h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 20px; } .game-controls { margin: 20px 0; } .game-controls button { padding: 10px 20px; margin: 0 5px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; transition: all 0.3s; } .game-controls button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .game-info { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 30px; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 18px; } .game-board-container { position: relative; display: inline-block; margin: 20px 0; } .game-board { display: grid; gap: 5px; background: #333; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; } .tile { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; user-select: none; } .tile:hover { transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } .tile.empty { background: transparent; cursor: default; } .tile.empty:hover { transform: none; box-shadow: none; } .game-win { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-win.hidden { display: none; } .game-win button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 5px; } .game-instructions { margin-top: 30px; text-align: left; padding: 20px; background: var(--block, #f5f5f5); border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } let currentSize = 3; let tiles = []; let emptyPos = { x: 0, y: 0 }; let moves = 0; let timer = 0; let timerInterval = null; let gameStarted = false; function getBestScore(size) { return localStorage.getItem(`puzzle${size}x${size}Best`); } function setBestScore(size, score) { localStorage.setItem(`puzzle${size}x${size}Best`, score); } function updateBestScore() { const best = getBestScore(currentSize); document.getElementById('bestScore').textContent = best || '-'; } function initTiles(size) { tiles = []; for (let i = 0; i < size * size - 1; i++) { tiles.push(i + 1); } tiles.push(0); // 0 表示空格 } function shuffleTiles() { // 随机打乱，但确保可解 for (let i = tiles.length - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1)); [tiles[i], tiles[j]] = [tiles[j], tiles[i]]; } // 检查是否可解，如果不可解则交换两个非空方块 if (!isSolvable()) { const first = tiles.findIndex(t => t !== 0); const second = tiles.findIndex((t, i) => t !== 0 && i > first); [tiles[first], tiles[second]] = [tiles[second], tiles[first]]; } } function isSolvable() { let inversions = 0; const size = currentSize; for (let i = 0; i < tiles.length; i++) { for (let j = i + 1; j < tiles.length; j++) { if (tiles[i] && tiles[j] && tiles[i] > tiles[j]) { inversions++; } } } if (size % 2 === 1) { return inversions % 2 === 0; } else { const emptyRow = Math.floor(tiles.indexOf(0) / size); const emptyRowFromBottom = size - emptyRow; return (inversions + emptyRowFromBottom) % 2 === 1; } } function findEmpty() { const index = tiles.indexOf(0); return { x: index % currentSize, y: Math.floor(index / currentSize) }; } function render() { const gameBoard = document.getElementById('gameBoard'); gameBoard.innerHTML = ''; const tileSize = currentSize === 3 ? 100 : currentSize === 4 ? 80 : 65; gameBoard.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${currentSize}, ${tileSize}px)`; gameBoard.style.gridTemplateRows = `repeat(${currentSize}, ${tileSize}px)`; for (let i = 0; i < tiles.length; i++) { const tile = document.createElement('div'); tile.className = 'tile'; tile.style.width = `${tileSize}px`; tile.style.height = `${tileSize}px`; if (tiles[i] === 0) { tile.classList.add('empty'); } else { tile.textContent = tiles[i]; tile.addEventListener('click', () => moveTile(i)); } gameBoard.appendChild(tile); } document.getElementById('moves').textContent = moves; } function canMove(index) { const emptyIndex = tiles.indexOf(0); const size = currentSize; const emptyX = emptyIndex % size; const emptyY = Math.floor(emptyIndex / size); const tileX = index % size; const tileY = Math.floor(index / size); const dx = Math.abs(emptyX - tileX); const dy = Math.abs(emptyY - tileY); return (dx === 1 && dy === 0) || (dx === 0 && dy === 1); } function moveTile(index) { if (!canMove(index)) return; if (!gameStarted) { gameStarted = true; startTimer(); } const emptyIndex = tiles.indexOf(0); [tiles[index], tiles[emptyIndex]] = [tiles[emptyIndex], tiles[index]]; moves++; render(); checkWin(); } function startTimer() { timerInterval = setInterval(() => { timer++; document.getElementById('timer').textContent = timer; }, 1000); } function stopTimer() { if (timerInterval) { clearInterval(timerInterval); timerInterval = null; } } function checkWin() { for (let i = 0; i < tiles.length - 1; i++) { if (tiles[i] !== i + 1) { return; } } stopTimer(); document.getElementById('finalTime').textContent = timer; document.getElementById('finalMoves').textContent = moves; const score = timer + moves; const best = getBestScore(currentSize); if (!best || score < parseInt(best)) { setBestScore(currentSize, score); updateBestScore(); } document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.remove('hidden'); } function newGame(size) { currentSize = size; moves = 0; timer = 0; gameStarted = false; stopTimer(); updateBestScore(); document.getElementById('timer').textContent = '0'; document.getElementById('gameWin').classList.add('hidden'); initTiles(size); shuffleTiles(); render(); } // 键盘控制 document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => { const emptyIndex = tiles.indexOf(0); const size = currentSize; const emptyX = emptyIndex % size; const emptyY = Math.floor(emptyIndex / size); let targetIndex = -1; switch (e.key) { case 'ArrowUp': if (emptyY < size - 1) { targetIndex = emptyIndex + size; } break; case 'ArrowDown': if (emptyY > 0) { targetIndex = emptyIndex - size; } break; case 'ArrowLeft': if (emptyX < size - 1) { targetIndex = emptyIndex + 1; } break; case 'ArrowRight': if (emptyX > 0) { targetIndex = emptyIndex - 1; } break; } if (targetIndex !== -1) { moveTile(targetIndex); e.preventDefault(); } }); // 初始化游戏 newGame(3);

} .cell[data-number="6"] { color: #008080; } .cell[data-number="7"] { color: #000000; } .cell[data-number="8"] { color: #808080; } .game-over { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.9); color: white; padding: 30px; border-radius: 10px; text-align: center; } .game-over.hidden { display: none; } .game-over button { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 16px; border-radius: 10px; } .game-instructions h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; } .game-instructions ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-instructions li { padding: 8px 0; padding-left: 20px; position: relative; } .game-instructions li:before { content: "•"; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } let board = []; let rows = 9; let cols = 9; let mines = 10; let minesLeft = 10; let gameOver = false; let firstClick = true; let timer = 0; let timerInterval = null; const difficulties = { easy: { rows: 9, cols: 9, mines: 10 }, medium: { rows: 16, cols: 16, mines: 40 }, hard: { rows: 16, cols: 30, mines: 99 } }; function initBoard() { board = []; for (let i = 0; i < rows; i++) { board[i] = []; for (let j = 0; j < cols; j++) { board[i][j] = { mine: false, revealed: false, flagged: false, count: 0 }; } } } function placeMines(excludeRow, excludeCol) { let placed = 0; while (placed < mines) { const r = Math.floor(Math.random() * rows); const c = Math.floor(Math.random() * cols); // 排除第一次点击的位置及其周围 if (Math.abs(r - excludeRow)

title: 魔方
content: 🎲 3D魔方 点击魔方面并拖动来旋转层，拖动空白区域旋转视角！ 🔀 打乱 🔄 重置 旋转次数 0 游戏时间 00:00 🎮 操作说明 🖱️ 点击魔方面并拖动来旋转该层 🔄 在空白区域拖动旋转整体视角 📱 支持触屏操作 🎯 将魔方还原为初始状态获胜！ .rubiks-game-container { max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; text-align: center; } .rubiks-game-container h1 { font-size: 2.5em; margin-bottom: 10px; } .game-desc { color: var(--text-p3, #666); margin-bottom: 30px; } #rubiks-game-canvas { width: 100%; height: 450px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a2e 0%, #16213e 100%); border-radius: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px; overflow: hidden; cursor: grab; } #rubiks-game-canvas:active { cursor: grabbing; } .game-controls { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 15px; margin-bottom: 30px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .control-btn { padding: 12px 30px; font-size: 16px; border: none; border-radius: 25px; background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s ease; font-weight: 500; } .control-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.4); } .control-btn:active { transform: translateY(-1px); } .game-stats { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 40px; margin-bottom: 30px; } .stat-item { text-align: center; } .stat-label { display: block; color: var(--text-p3, #666); font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 5px; } .stat-value { font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; color: var(--theme, #3498db); } .game-tips { background: var(--card, #fff); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; text-align: left; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); } .game-tips h3 { margin-bottom: 15px; color: var(--text, #333); } .game-tips ul { list-style: none; padding: 0; } .game-tips li { padding: 8px 0; color: var(--text-p2, #555); } @media (max-width: 600px) { #rubiks-game-canvas { height: 350px; } .game-stats { gap: 20px; } .stat-value { font-size: 24px; } } (function() { 'use strict'; var rotateCount = 0; var gameStartTime = Date.now(); var timerInterval = null; window.RubiksGame = { scene: null, camera: null, renderer: null, cubes: [], cubeGroup: null, container: null, isAnimating: false, raycaster: null, mouse: null, isDragging: false, isRotatingLayer: false, selectedFace: null, selectedCube: null, dragStart: { x: 0, y: 0 }, layerCubes: [], rotationAxis: null, rotationLayer: null, rotationDirection: null, pivot: null, initialized: false, init: function() { if (this.initialized) return; this.initialized = true; this.container = document.getElementById('rubiks-game-canvas'); if (!this.container) return; this.raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster(); this.mouse = new THREE.Vector2(); try { this.createScene(); this.createCamera(); this.createRenderer(); this.createLights(); this.createRubiksCube(); this.bindEvents(); this.animate(); this.startTimer(); } catch(e) { console.error('RubiksGame init error:', e); } }, createScene: function() { this.scene = new THREE.Scene(); }, createCamera: function() { var width = this.container.offsetWidth || 400; var height = this.container.offsetHeight || 450; this.camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(50, width / height, 0.1, 1000); this.camera.position.set(6, 6, 6); this.camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0); }, createRenderer: function() { this.renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ alpha: true, antialias: true }); var width = this.container.offsetWidth || 400; var height = this.container.offsetHeight || 450; this.renderer.setSize(width, height); this.renderer.setClearColor(0x000000, 0); this.container.appendChild(this.renderer.domElement); }, createLights: function() { var ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.6); this.scene.add(ambientLight); var directionalLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.8); directionalLight.position.set(5, 5, 5); this.scene.add(directionalLight); var directionalLight2 = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.4); directionalLight2.position.set(-5, -5, -5); this.scene.add(directionalLight2); }, createRubiksCube: function() { var size = 0.95; var gap = 0.05; var totalSize = size + gap; var colors = { front: 0xff0000, back: 0xff8c00, top: 0xffffff, bottom: 0xffff00, right: 0x0000ff, left: 0x00ff00 }; this.cubeGroup = new THREE.Group(); this.cubes = []; for (var x = -1; x 20) { var selectedCube = this.selectedCube; var selectedFace = this.selectedFace; this.isRotatingLayer = false; this.selectedCube = null; this.selectedFace = null; this.startLayerRotation(deltaX, deltaY, selectedCube, selectedFace); } } else { this.cubeGroup.rotation.y += deltaX * 0.01; this.cubeGroup.rotation.x += deltaY * 0.01; this.dragStart.x = clientX;
