} 看板娘登陆平台 用户名 密码 记住我 登录 Copyleft Mimi /* * _(:з」∠)_ * Created by Shuqiao Zhang in 2019. * https://zhangshuqiao.org */ /* * This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify * it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by * the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or * (at your option) any later version. * * This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, * but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of * MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the * GNU General Public License for more details. */ import { Cubism2Model } from "../build/index.js"; document.getElementById("text").innerHTML = `MIMIPOWERED`.repeat(10); document.getElementById("year").innerText = new Date().getFullYear(); window.addEventListener("load", () => { if (!CSS.supports("clip-path", "circle(120px at center)")) { document.getElementById("stage").innerHTML = ''; return; } const coverPosition = pos => document.getElementById("cover").style.bottom = pos; const apiPath = "https://live2d.fghrsh.net/api"; let state = 0, loading = false; const model = new Cubism2Model(); const modelId = 1; let modelTexturesId = 0; loadModel(); function setState(newState) { state = newState; if (state === 0) coverPosition("10%"); else if (state === 1) coverPosition("20%"); else if (state === 2) coverPosition("80%"); } async function loadModel() { const modelSettingPath = `${apiPath}/get/?id=${modelId}-${modelTexturesId}`; const response = await fetch(modelSettingPath); const modelSetting = await response.json(); if (!model.gl) { await model.init('live2d', modelSettingPath, modelSetting); } else { await model.changeModelWithJSON(modelSettingPath, modelSetting); } console.log("live2d", `模型 ${modelId}-${modelTexturesId} 加载完成`); setState(2); } async function loadRandModel() { const response = await fetch(`${apiPath}/rand_textures/?id=${modelId}-${modelTexturesId}`); const result = await response.json(); modelTexturesId = result.textures.id; await loadModel(); setState(2); } document.getElementById("info").addEventListener("click", () => { fetch("https://v1.hitokoto.cn") .then(response => response.json()) .then(result => { alert("「" + result.hitokoto + "」——" + result.from); }); }); document.getElementById("refresh").addEventListener("click", async () => { if (loading) return; loading = true; setState(0); await loadRandModel(); loading = false; }); document.getElementById("handle").addEventListener("click", () => { if (state === 1) { setState(2); } else if (state === 2) { setState(1); } }); document.querySelector("input[type=password]").addEventListener("focus", () => { if (state === 2) { setState(1); } }); document.querySelector("input[type=password]").addEventListener("blur", () => { if (state === 1) { setState(2); } }); });

title: 设置
content: 🛠️ 没用的工具 🔮 占卜 进入占卜 🔢 计算器 打开计算器 🎨 主题设置 深色模式 🌙 切换主题 📖 阅读设置 文章布局 (默认: 网格) 网格 列表 紧凑 仅标题 分类页面样式 📋 简洁列表 ⏳ 时间轴 聚光灯阅读 聚光灯大小 150px 🔄 反转设置 🔄 博客反转 正常 ↕️ 上下反转 ↔️ 左右反转 🔀 全反转 🎢 反向滚动 🖱️ 鼠标特效设置 显卡故障效果 自定义右键菜单 鼠标样式 默认 点击特效 无 滑动特效 无 🎮 看板娘设置 显示看板娘 看板娘模型 📈 波纹 🖥️ 界面显示 📊 时间信息面板 🎵 音乐播放器 🎵 音乐搜索 搜索歌曲 搜索 音源选择 小秋 小蜗 小芸 小枸 小蜜 音量大小 50% 播放列表管理 查看列表 清空列表 🔍 SEO优化 ▼ Open Graph标签 自动生成社交媒体分享标签 Canonical URL 规范链接，防止重复内容 自动摘要 自动截取文章前128字作为摘要 💡 提示 SEO优化功能由主题配置文件控制，以上功能已默认启用。修改配置请编辑 _config.yml 文件。 这些优化不会改变博客的布局或功能，仅影响搜索引擎收录效果。 📊 数据管理 清除本地缓存 清除缓存 游戏最高分记录 查看记录 🃏 成就获取指南 查看方法 🏆 文章排行榜 ▼ 📝 字数排行 🖼️ 图片排行 加载中... 🏆 游戏最高分记录 🃏 成就获取指南 .settings-wrapper { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 40px 20px; } .settings-container { width: 100%; } .settings-container h1 { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; } .settings-section { background: var(--card, #fff); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; border: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); } .settings-section h2 { margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 20px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); } .collapsible-header { cursor: pointer; user-select: none; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; transition: background 0.2s ease; padding: 8px 12px; margin: -8px -12px 20px -12px; border-radius: 8px; } .collapsible-header:hover { background: var(--card-hover, rgba(0,0,0,0.05)); } .toggle-icon { font-size: 14px; transition: transform 0.3s ease; } .collapsible-content { animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease; } @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .setting-item { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--border, #e0e0e0); } .setting-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; } .setting-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-p3, #888); margin-left: 10px; } .seo-info { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; } .seo-tip { font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-p3, #888); margin: 4px 0; line-height: 1.6; } .seo-tip code { background: var(--card, #f5f5f5); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; } .setting-item span { font-size: 1em; color: var(--text-p1); } .tool-link { background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white !important; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; transition: all 0.2s; } .tool-link:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); } button { background: var(--theme, #3498db); color: white; border: none; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 0.9em; transition: all 0.2s; } button:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); } .danger-btn { background: #ef4444; } .danger-btn:hover { background: #dc2626; } .tool-link { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 12px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: #fff; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9em; transition: all 0.2s; } .tool-link:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: translateY(-1px); color: #fff; } .theme-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .layout-options { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .layout-options button { padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 0.85em; } .layout-btn { padding: 6px 12px; border: 2px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; background: var(--card, #fff); transition: all 0.2s; color: var(--text-p1); } .layout-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .layout-btn.active { border-color: var(--theme, #3498db); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--theme, #3498db); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--theme, #3498db) 15%, transparent); } .category-style-options { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .category-style-btn { padding: 6px 12px; border: 2px solid var(--border, #e0e0e0); border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; background: var(--card, #fff); transition: all 0.2s; color: var(--text-p1); } .category-style-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .category-style-btn.active { border-color: var(--theme, #3498db); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--theme, #3498db); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--theme, #3498db) 15%, transparent); } .about-info p { margin: 8px 0; color: var(--text-p2); } .about-info a { color: var(--accent); } .modal { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; z-index: 1000; backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
